title: Romulea reflexa
taxonomy: Romulea reflexa is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae, commonly known as the iris family. It is a member of the genus Romulea, which is a group of small, bulbous plants native to southern Africa. The genus Romulea is further divided into several species, including Romulea reflexa, which is characterized by its delicate, reflexed petals. Romulea reflexa is a popular ornamental plant in gardens and is valued for its vibrant, often purple flowers. The classification of Romulea reflexa reflects its unique characteristics and its relationships within the broader plant kingdom.
